visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a man wearing large black headphones. He has a serious and intense expression, staring intently at something off-screen. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting a dimly lit room. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera is static, holding a tight focus on the man's face. The audio opens with a series of sharp, rhythmic, and percussive electronic beeps, creating a tense and urgent atmosphere, as if a critical alert is sounding.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a different man in a dimly lit, institutional-looking room. He is wearing a dark suit, a white collared shirt, and a loosened tie. He looks off-camera with a concerned and slightly shocked expression, his mouth slightly agape. In the background, a whiteboard with faint writing is visible on the wall. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," appear in the top left corner. The camera remains still. A man then speaks in a serious and urgent tone, his voice filled with concern as he delivers a report. He says, "阿张同志，龙骨滩收获" (Comrade A Zhang, we have a收获,
